9239 {

9241 if (WorldGen.SecretSeed.errorWorld.Enabled && WorldGen.genRand.Next(4) != 0)
9242 {
9243 num215 = WorldGen.genRand.Next((int)Main.worldSurface + 50, Main.UnderworldLayer - 50);
9244 }
9245 }
9246 bool flag14 = false;
9247 if (num203 >= num202)
9248 {
9249 flag14 = true;
9250 }
9251 if (WorldGen.SecretSeed.extraFloatingIslands.Enabled && num206 > 4)
9252 {
9253 if (!flag12)
9254 {
9255 flag14 = true;
9256 }

9258 {
9259 flag14 = true;
9260 }
9261 }
9262 if (flag14)
9263 {
9264 flag12 = true;
9265 GenVars.skyLake[GenVars.numIslandHouses] = true;

9268 else
9269 {
9270 GenVars.skyLake[GenVars.numIslandHouses] = false;

9272 {

9274 {
9275 num214 = 3;

9277 }
9278 else
9279 {
9280 num214 = 1;
9281 WorldGen.DesertCloudIsland(num208, num215);
9282 }
9283 }
9284 else
9285 {
9286 if (WorldGen.remixWorldGen && WorldGen.drunkWorldGen && (!WorldGen.tenthAnniversaryWorldGen || WorldGen.getGoodWorldGen))
9287 {
9288 if (GenVars.crimsonLeft && num208 < Main.maxTilesX / 2)
9289 {
9290 num214 = 5;
9291 }
9292 else if (!GenVars.crimsonLeft && num208 > Main.maxTilesX / 2)
9293 {
9294 num214 = 5;
9295 }
9296 else
9297 {
9298 num214 = 4;
9299 }
9300 }
9301 else if (!WorldGen.notTheBees || WorldGen.remixWorldGen)
9302 {
9303 if (WorldGen.getGoodWorldGen || (WorldGen.remixWorldGen && !WorldGen.tenthAnniversaryWorldGen))
9304 {
9305 if (WorldGen.crimson)
9306 {
9307 num214 = 5;
9308 }
9309 else
9310 {
9311 num214 = 4;
9312 }
9313 }

9315 {
9316 num214 = 6;
9317 }
9318 }
9319 WorldGen.CloudIsland(num208, num215);
9320 }
9321 }

9323 GenVars.floatingIslandHouseY[GenVars.numIslandHouses] = num215;
9324 GenVars.floatingIslandStyle[GenVars.numIslandHouses] = num214;
9325 GenVars.numIslandHouses++;
9326 num203++;
9327 }
9328 }
9329 }
9330 num206++;
9331 }

9337 WorldGen.AddGenerationPass(GenPassNameID.DirtToMud, delegate(GenerationProgress progress, GameConfiguration passConfig)
9338 {
9339 if (WorldGen.Skyblock.denyAllGeneration)
9340 {
9341 return;
9342 }
9343 progress.Message = Lang.gen[14].Value;
9344 double num218 = (double)(Main.maxTilesX * Main.maxTilesY) * 0.001;
9345 int num219 = 0;
9346 while ((double)num219 < num218)
9347 {
9348 progress.Set((double)num219 / num218);
9349 if (WorldGen.remixWorldGen)
9350 {
9351 WorldGen.TileRunner(WorldGen.genRand.Next(0, Main.maxTilesX), WorldGen.genRand.Next((int)Main.worldSurface, (int)GenVars.rockLayerLow), (double)WorldGen.genRand.Next(2, 6), WorldGen.genRand.Next(2, 40), 59, false, 0.0, 0.0, false, true, 53);
9352 }

9354 {
9355 WorldGen.TileRunner(WorldGen.genRand.Next(0, Main.maxTilesX), WorldGen.genRand.Next((int)GenVars.rockLayerLow, Main.maxTilesY), (double)WorldGen.genRand.Next(2, 6), WorldGen.genRand.Next(2, 40), 59, false, 0.0, 0.0, false, true, 53);

19031 {

19035 }
19036 }
19037 }

19043 {

19046 }

19051 {
19052 if (Main.tile[num1271, num1277].active())
19053 {
